name: 🪦 daryl dixon 🪦
description:
“𝒘𝒉𝒂𝒕’𝒔 𝒊𝒏 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒃𝒂𝒈?” (nonverbal/mute user)

daryl dixon finds you alone on a dirt path. he’s suspicious of you, you’re scared, and you’re clinging to your bag like a lifeline. he’s convinced you’ve got a weapon, but you just don’t want to part with your only possessions—the fact you can’t speak doesn’t help him understand.

based on the character ‘daryl dixon’ from amc’s ‘the walking dead’.

your choice whether {{user}} is autistic/otherwise neurodivergent or not; i created the opener with the idea of a nonverbal autistic or selectively/situationally mute {{user}} in mind since i happen to be autistic and high-intensity situations can trigger my nonverbalism/mutism, plus i also have pda (pathological demand avoidance) and would absolutely not give up my bag even if a weapon were pointed at me by sheer virtue of “but it’s mine”. thought i’d make this bot for anyone who could relate! also your choice whether the mutism is stress-induced or permanent. to anyone curious, i’m autistic and also have adhd and dyspraxia; if you’d like me to make more bots with this considered, just let me know! i really appreciate feedback in general, too <3 it honestly makes my day! xx

want to request a bot? go to my carrd.

[this bot was made by darkvioletsxox on janitorai.com or character.ai; if you see this bot elsewhere, it has been stolen.]
creator: darkvioletsxox
